query: What changed in extraction, what still lags in evaluation, and what should the next AI work on?
summary: Key context: The comparative benchmark still measures 88% Hit@k and 73% exact support for Waggle on 27 scenarios and 66 queries, despite the extraction improvements.; The deterministic extraction corpus was expanded from 18 to 25 cases and now covers favorite-language phrasing, multi-clause turns, hedged statements, conditio…. Decisions: Hedged or conditional turns such as "I think we should probably go with Redis" are stored as note nodes instead of hard… Supported by Avoid premature commitment; Negated statements such as "We are not using MongoDB anymore" are stored as decision nodes with negated tags so the gra… Supported by Preserve user polarity. Open items: Context handoff dogfood; Query bundle summary improvement.

nodes.label: Current comparative gap
nodes.content: The comparative benchmark still measures 88% Hit@k and 73% exact support for Waggle on 27 scenarios and 66 queries, despite the extraction improvements.

nodes.label: Hedged statements policy
nodes.content: Hedged or conditional turns such as "I think we should probably go with Redis" are stored as note nodes instead of hard decisions.

nodes.label: Extraction corpus expansion
nodes.content: The deterministic extraction corpus was expanded from 18 to 25 cases and now covers favorite-language phrasing, multi-clause turns, hedged statements, conditional choices, and negated tool decisions.

nodes.label: Context handoff dogfood
nodes.content: Context handoff was tested by exporting a bundle from the Waggle project and checking whether another model could continue work without replaying the whole thread.

nodes.label: Avoid premature commitment
nodes.content: Tentative language should not be promoted into durable decision memory until it becomes explicit.

nodes.label: Negated tool choice policy
nodes.content: Negated statements such as "We are not using MongoDB anymore" are stored as decision nodes with negated tags so the graph preserves polarity.

nodes.label: Query bundle summary improvement
nodes.content: Query-mode export now synthesizes selected nodes into a useful summary instead of emitting a generic node-and-edge count.

nodes.label: Preserve user polarity
nodes.content: Missing negation would store the opposite of what the user said and silently corrupt the graph.

nodes.label: LongMemEval methodology note
nodes.content: A methodology note explains graph_raw versus graph_hybrid, the cold-versus-warm prepared-session cache, and how the saved artifacts were produced.

timeline.label: LongMemEval methodology note -> Current comparative gap
Context handoff dogfood -> Query bundle summary improvement
Extraction corpus expansion -> Current comparative gap
Negated tool choice policy -> Preserve user polarity
Hedged statements policy -> Avoid premature commitment
Query bundle summary improvement

recommended_paste_order: Paste the summary and key facts first.
Paste decisions, contradictions, and timeline next.
Paste appendix chunks only if the receiving AI needs more detail.
